user_system_path: Foundation so the first indispensable R1 card fires (#567). #606 (MERGED PR #607, fe3bd70) fixed a live-diagnosed bug plausibly responsible for the silence: evaluateCommandCenterCandidateGate's INTERNAL_DEBUG_PATTERN bare-UUID clause was false-positiving on raw commitment/signal ids embedded in hunt-anomalies.ts evidenceLines, killing real R1-shaped candidates pre-LLM. Not yet live-verified. #567's remaining scope: tkg_goals re-ground + Gmail connector fix (1→967), both owner sign-off gated.
allowed_files_raw: Allow-by-default-minus-forbidden (friction reduction, owner-directed 2026-06-22). The real guard is forbidden_file_patterns + the proof doctrine, not a whitelist.
forbidden_files_raw: HARD RAILS: No Stripe, Scout (lib/scout — the outward R6 rung re-enters only behind owner sign-off + new anti-fabrication guardrails), schema/migration, or secrets changes. No auto-send. No BLIND loosening of positive_winner_contract or the discrepancy-card quality gate — every gate change carries a test + before/after read. R1's own-activity carve-out is additive (does not weaken the external-entity requirement for any other class).
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run typecheck; npx vitest run lib/briefing lib/workday-presence (baseline 1097 green post-#606)
required_browser_proof: Live (owner): a fresh own-activity thread (email_sent / file_modified) for 2cbc1bab produces a directive (not do_nothing) of next-move/finished shape that lands in Slack with a workday_presence_slack_send receipt in tkg_actions. First check: re-query pipeline_runs/workday_presence_suppression_trace to confirm #606's fix cleared the two previously-stuck commitment candidates.
browser_proof_command: manual: replay a fresh email_sent/file_modified signal for 2cbc1bab through the engine; confirm directive shape + seeded=true + Slack card + receipt. Supabase MCP: select outcome, gate_funnel, raw_extras from pipeline_runs order by created_at desc limit 5; select raw_user_meta_data->'workday_presence_suppression_trace' from auth.users where id = '2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f';
acceptance_condition: gate:continuity green + vitest green (baseline + new tests) + PR merged + live own-activity act delivered with a persisted receipt for 2cbc1bab.
anti_regression_checks: no edits under app/api/stripe, lib/scout, supabase/migrations

INTERNAL_DEBUG_PATTERN (artifact-quality-gate.ts) stays unchanged going forward — still catches request_id/provider_error/stack-trace/req_... leaks (regression test in artifact-quality-gate.test.ts); any new evidenceLines/candidateText source must not embed raw record ids (#606)
no loosening of any existing quality gate; no auto-send
stop_condition: #567 owner sign-offs done (tkg_goals re-ground + Gmail connector 1→967); pipeline_runs has traceable rows after delivery trigger; no ghost-goal drift card; #606's fix confirmed live (stuck commitment candidates now clear).
next_command: Live-verify #606 first (re-query pipeline_runs/workday_presence_suppression_trace). Then #567 owner sign-offs (tkg_goals re-ground + Gmail connector 1→967). Follow-up: #597 live dismissal-tap verification once a real card exists; pool-hygiene seam (88 active commitments overdue 30d+); reconnect inactive Google/Microsoft OAuth tokens.
